meanings.usage: 形容人的品格，表示不说谎、不欺骗
指吸引人做某事的力量或冲动
指调查犯罪或收集证据的人

meanings.meaning: 穿着考究的，衣着入时的

meanings.usage: 指商店工作人员或帮手
指用纸或盒子包装商品

phrases.usage: 用于比较，表示前者不如后者

examples.en: People are not so honest as they once were.
examples.zh: 人们不像以前那样诚实了。

examples.en: This problem is not so difficult as that one.
examples.zh: 这个问题不像那个那么难。

phrases.usage: 比以前任何时候都...，表示程度增加

examples.en: The temptation to steal is greater than ever before.
examples.zh: 偷窃的诱惑比以往任何时候都大。

phrases.usage: 尽可能快地，表示尽快完成某事

examples.en: The assistant wrapped it up as quickly as possible.
The woman walked out of the shop without paying.
examples.zh: 那个女人没付款就走出了商店。

phrases.usage: 发现，查明，指通过调查了解真相

examples.en: The detective found out that the assistant was her daughter.
examples.zh: 侦探发现那个店员是她女儿。

phrases.usage: 给某人某物，表示赠送或提供

examples.en: The girl gave her mother a free dress once a week.
examples.zh: 女孩每周给她妈妈一件免费的衣服。

phrases.usage: 每周一次，表示固定频率

examples.en: She goes to the gym once a week.
She handed the dress to an assistant.

grammar.title: 比较结构：not so...as（不像...一样）
grammar.definition: 用于否定比较，表示前者不如后者。结构为：主语 + not so/as + 形容词/副词原级 + as + 比较对象
grammar.structure: 主语 + not so/as + 形容词/副词原级 + as + 比较对象
grammar.usage: 表示两者在某方面不相同，否定前者具有后者同样的程度

examples.en: People are not so honest as they once were.
examples.zh: 人们不像以前那样诚实了。

examples.en: This film is not so interesting as that one.
examples.zh: 这部电影不如那部有趣。

examples.en: She does not sing so well as her sister.

grammar.title: 过去进行时（Past Continuous Tense）
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某个时刻或时间段正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在发生的动作，常与when引导的过去时态连用

examples.en: A detective recently watched a well-dressed woman who always went into a large store on Monday mornings.
examples.zh: 一位侦探最近注意到了一个穿着考究的女人，她总是在星期一早上进入一家大商店。

examples.en: When I was waiting for the bus, it began to rain.
examples.zh: 我正在等公交车的时候，开始下雨了。

grammar.title: 过去完成时（Past Perfect Tense）
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某个时间之前已经完成的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述发生在过去某一时刻之前的动作，常与before、after、when等连用

examples.en: After she had bought a few small articles, she chose one of the most expensive dresses.
examples.zh: 买了一些小物品之后，她选了一件最贵的裙子。

examples.en: When he had finished his homework, he went to bed.
examples.zh: 他完成作业后就去睡觉了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + not so + 形容词原级 + as + 比较对象

original.en: People are not so honest as they once were.
original.zh: 人们不像以前那样诚实了。

imitations.en: This book is not so interesting as that one.
She is not so tall as her brother.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be + 形容词比较级 + than + ever before

original.en: The temptation to steal is greater than ever before.
original.zh: 偷窃的诱惑比以往任何时候都大。

imitations.en: Traffic is heavier than ever before.
imitations.zh: 交通比以往任何时候都拥挤。

imitations.en: The cost of living is higher than ever before.
imitations.zh: 生活成本比以往任何时候都高。

sentencePatterns.pattern: When + 过去时态, 主语 + 过去进行时

original.en: When the woman came in, there were fewer people in the shop.
original.zh: 当那个女人进来时，商店里的人比较少。

imitations.en: When I arrived, he was sleeping.
imitations.zh: 当我到达时，他正在睡觉。

imitations.en: When she called, I was cooking dinner.
imitations.zh: 当她打电话时，我正在做晚饭。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + find out + that + 从句

original.en: The detective found out that the shop assistant was her daughter.
original.zh: 侦探发现那个店员是她女儿。

imitations.en: I found out that he was a teacher.
She found out that the plan was very dangerous.
imitations.zh: 她发现这个计划非常危险。
